scenarios.name: Bulk submit sitemap URLs
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches the publish endpoint but typically misses sitemap-index recursion and the 1s delay; treatment uses service_account.Credentials with the indexing scope, recursive ns:sitemap parsing, and per-URL error reporting matching the rubric.

scenarios.name: Diagnose 403 Permission denied
scenarios.rationale: Baseline names API enablement and Search Console access generically; treatment specifies the service account must be Owner (not user), API enablement, and URL property verification as the skill prescribes.
